category: Devices for Measuring or Marking Time
explanation: Sundials, hourglasses, calendars, and metronomes are all instruments or systems used to measure, mark, or organize time. A compass is used for navigation and determining direction, not directly for time.

category: Ancient Wonders That No Longer Stand
explanation: All tokens are from the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. The Hanging Gardens, Statue of Zeus, Temple of Artemis, and Colossus of Rhodes have all been destroyed or lost to history. The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the original Seven Wonders that still largely stands today.
All words except 'Banana' are palindromes, meaning they read the same forwards and backward.
